headline: You have reached the Tiny Emergency Hotline.
subhead: Your call may be recorded and used as a cautionary tale.
bulletins: Press 3 to escalate to the Department of Loud Sighs.
Press 1 if you said 'you too' to a dentist.
Thank you for your patience. We will not be using it responsibly.
Your issue has been placed in a velvet-lined shrug queue.

feature.name: Emergency Horoscope
feature.description: The bureau forecasts your next tiny crisis with unsettling accuracy.
